items.name: drift-field
items.title: Drift Field
items.description: An infinite, seamless background that tiles any SVG and drifts it on a pure-CSS loop. Tune tile size, speed and direction.

items.name: sprite-field
items.title: Sprite Field
items.description: A canvas field of any SVG that drifts forever and springs away from the pointer. Tune density, size, speed, tints and pointer push.
